productDisplayName: Lotto Men Vienna III Grey Sports Shoes
description: Designed for the Sports junkie who never compromises on style and comfort, the Vienna III shoe from lotto comes with a durable upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you stable on various surfaces.UpperMesh upper with perforations on the synthetic overlaysCentral lace-ups with a padded tonguePadded mesh inner with a soft footbedBranding on the tongue and the heel collarOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe region to act as the toe guardMidsoleFoamy rubber midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection OutsoleDurable rubber outsole Punto Flex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementCurved midsole with a decoupled heel and waffle pattened lugs all ovverShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
